9640578279.title: Add Business Locations to Website Footer
9640578279.whyItMatters: Having consistent business location information throughout your website helps Google understand where you serve customers and improves local search rankings.

9654911213.title: Add Maps and Address Blocks
9654911213.whyItMatters: Location pages with embedded maps and clear address information help customers find you and signal to Google that you're a legitimate local business.

9474981474.title: Investigate Drop in Phone Calls
9474981474.whyItMatters: A sudden decrease in calls often indicates your website has dropped in search rankings, meaning fewer potential customers are finding you online.

8978437831.title: Set Up Automated Review Responses
8978437831.whyItMatters: Responding quickly to customer reviews shows Google and potential customers that you're an active, engaged business, which can improve your local search visibility.

8918332032.title: Order LSA Performance Dashboard
8918332032.whyItMatters: A dedicated dashboard lets you track how your Local Services Ads are performing so you can optimize them to get more qualified leads.

8918332062.title: Schedule LSA Audit Review Meeting
8918332062.whyItMatters: Reviewing your Local Services Ads setup ensures everything is optimized correctly to maximize your ad visibility and lead quality.

8918332090.title: Conduct LSA Audit Review Call
8918332090.whyItMatters: Walking through your Local Services Ads performance helps identify opportunities to improve your ad visibility and attract more qualified customers.

8918332044.title: Set Up LSA Dashboard Access
8918332044.whyItMatters: Having easy access to your Local Services Ads dashboard allows you to monitor performance and make data-driven decisions to improve your ad results.

8918332154.title: Send LSA Welcome Email
8918332154.whyItMatters: A proper welcome email ensures you understand how to use Local Services Ads effectively to generate more qualified leads for your business.

8918332077.title: Submit LSA Account for Review
8918332077.whyItMatters: Having Google review your Local Services Ads account ensures it's properly set up to maximize your visibility in local search results.
